name_en: ⚠️ Thick fabric with thick stitching, original batch
name_cn:
⚠️ Thick fabric with thick stitching, original batch
Medium [Di0r Book Tote]
Most people think of buying practical classic styles first when consuming luxury brands 💄
But actually, a collaboration art TOTE like DIOR should be a key collectible, full of vintage vibes 😋
Carry it and you are a fashion icon ⚪
It really holds a lot 😍
Super spacious capacity, feels like it can hold the whole world!
36*27*16cm
